title: Wabbajack
description: Sheogorath's infamous artifact, brought into Minecraft
body:
![Made for ModFest: Toybox](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModFest/art/refs/heads/v2/badge/svg/toybox/cozy.svg)

Brings the Wabbajack artifact from the world of The Elder Scrolls into your Minecraft world, with as much madness and unpredictability as the original.
